subject: Update on your application for Senior Product Manager, API & Agentic Banking
body:
Hi Jane,

Thanks for your interest in Mercury and for taking the time to apply for the Senior PM, API & Agentic Banking role. After careful review, we've decided to move forward with other candidates whose experience more closely matches the team's current needs.

We wish you the best in your search and hope you'll keep us in mind for future opportunities.

Best,
The Mercury Talent Team

_expected.role: Senior Product Manager, API & Agentic Banking
